0.text: Bronchial wall thickening at the bilateral central level

1.text: Peribronchial ground glass opacities in both lower lobes, more prominent on the right

2.text: Reticulonodular density increases in both lower lobes, more prominent on the right

3.text: Minimal peribronchial consolidation on the right

4.text: Minimal subpleural consolidation on the right
